dx :
  ∀ j ∈ Finset.range n,
    ∀ ℓ ∈ Finset.range k, |a + (↑ℓ + ↑j * ↑k + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (a + (↑j + 1) * (b - a) / ↑n)| < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ a + (↑ℓ + ↑j * ↑k + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) ∈ Set.Icc a b
